title: NDA (II) 2026 GAT Question Paper
description: Official UPSC Mathematics question paper for NDA (I) 2026. Contains 120 questions covering Algebra, Trigonometry, Analytical Geometry, Differential Calculus, Vector Algebra, Probability, and Statistics.

title: NDA (I) 2026 General Ability Test (GAT) Paper
description: Official UPSC General Ability Test (GAT) paper for NDA (I) 2026. Section A includes English grammar and comprehension, and Section B covers Physics, Chemistry, General Science, History, Geography, and Current Affairs.

title: CDS (I) 2026 English Question Paper
description: Official UPSC CDS (I) 2026 English language question paper. Features 120 questions testing synonyms, antonyms, spotting errors, reading comprehension, idioms, cloze test, and ordering of sentences.

title: CDS (I) 2026 General Knowledge Paper
description: Official UPSC CDS (I) 2026 General Knowledge question paper. Contains comprehensive questions from General Science, Indian History, World & Indian Geography, Indian Polity, Economy, and Current Affairs.

title: AFCAT (II) 2025 Memory Based Question Paper
description: Memory-based compiled question paper for AFCAT (II) 2025. Features questions from Verbal Ability, Numerical Ability, Reasoning, Military Aptitude, and General Awareness sections.

title: NDA Mathematics Mock Test - 01
description: High-yield mock test designed by DefenceRoger experts for NDA aspirants. Includes 120 questions with detailed solutions covering Calculus, Coordinate Geometry, Matrices, and Trigonometry.

title: CDS General Knowledge Mock Test - 01
description: Full-length mock exam for CDS General Knowledge. Features handpicked questions on Indian Constitution, Modern History, General Science, and recent National/International Defence news.

title: AFCAT Full Length Mock Test - 01
description: Complete mock test matching the latest AFCAT online exam pattern. Consists of 100 questions from English, GK, Numerical Ability, and Reasoning and Aptitude with answers.
